auto.label: Auto — Primary owner for selected node

team_lead.label: Sanguk / Shariff — Logistics Team Lead
team_lead.role: Final logistics approval, escalation, human-gate decision

material_management.label: Minkyu Cha — Material Management / Invoice Review

customs_docs.label: Arvin — Overseas Inbound Docs & Customs

warehouse_execution.label: Ken — Warehouse Execution / LPO Status

domestic_lpo_docs.label: Karthik — Domestic LPO PL/DN/MTC Controller

marine_mosb.label: Haitham — Marine / MOSB / LCT Coordinator

mosb_field.label: Jhysn — MOSB VP24 Field Supervisor

site_receiving.label: Roldan — Gate Pass / Delivery / Site Receiving

operator_context.stage_gate: BOE cleared, DO released, required permit evidence attached, and release chronology valid before M100 Gate-out.
operator_context.what_it_means: This node is tied to import documentation, port release, customs clearance, or regulatory evidence.
what_to_check_now: BOE status is submitted/cleared or blocker is logged
DO is released and consignee/agent details are correct
MSDS/FANR/MOIAT/EC evidence exists when applicable
Free-time / DEM-DET exposure and M92/M100 timing are checked
operator_context.immediate_action: Confirm release readiness with DSV/port agent. If BOE/DO/permit evidence is missing, raise an AMBER blocker and assign the document owner.
operator_context.handoff_to: Roldan for gate/site delivery readiness; Ken if warehouse receipt is next; Haitham/Jhysn if MOSB staging is next.
operator_context.sla: Before truck dispatch / port free-time expiry
operator_context.source_rule: PII must be masked in routine graph export; actor nodes carry role evidence, not raw phone/e-mail.
operator_context.source_next_action: Use as semantic anchor; keep source link and evidence trail when mapping to Foundry Ontology.

operator_context.current_stage: M115–M117: MOSB Staged → LCT/Barge Loaded → Sail-away / Offshore Transit
operator_context.stage_gate: AGI/DAS offshore delivery requires MOSB staging plus LCT/barge loading/sail-away evidence before site-arrival confirmation.
operator_context.what_it_means: This node affects MOSB staging, vessel/LCT planning, SR submission, stowage/lashing/stability/lifting readiness or marine handover.
what_to_check_now: SR/WELLS or marine service request is submitted
Cargo priority list and loading sequence are current
Stowage/lashing/stability/lifting evidence exists for OOG/heavy items
M115/M116/M117 timestamps are attached before M130 site arrival
operator_context.immediate_action: Confirm marine readiness and attach LCT/vessel evidence. If AGI/DAS evidence is incomplete, keep the node AMBER and block site-arrival mutation.
operator_context.handoff_to: Jhysn/Ronnel for field status; Roldan/site team after offshore delivery; Minkyu for material status.
operator_context.sla: Before LCT loading / before AGI-DAS site-arrival confirmation
operator_context.source_rule: PII must be masked in routine graph export; actor nodes carry role evidence, not raw phone/e-mail.
operator_context.source_next_action: Use as semantic anchor; keep source link and evidence trail when mapping to Foundry Ontology.

operator_context.current_stage: M115–M117: MOSB Staged → LCT/Barge Loaded → Sail-away / Offshore Transit
operator_context.stage_gate: AGI/DAS offshore delivery requires MOSB staging plus LCT/barge loading/sail-away evidence before site-arrival confirmation.
operator_context.what_it_means: This node affects MOSB staging, vessel/LCT planning, SR submission, stowage/lashing/stability/lifting readiness or marine handover.
what_to_check_now: Why the node is AMBER: Source evidence is missing or role-only; attach source file or reviewer proof before operational use.
SR/WELLS or marine service request is submitted
Cargo priority list and loading sequence are current
Stowage/lashing/stability/lifting evidence exists for OOG/heavy items
M115/M116/M117 timestamps are attached before M130 site arrival
operator_context.immediate_action: Do not treat this as cleared. Confirm marine readiness and attach LCT/vessel evidence. If AGI/DAS evidence is incomplete, keep the node AMBER and block site-arrival mutation.
operator_context.handoff_to: Jhysn/Ronnel for field status; Roldan/site team after offshore delivery; Minkyu for material status.
operator_context.sla: Before LCT loading / before AGI-DAS site-arrival confirmation
operator_context.source_rule: PII must be masked in routine graph export; actor nodes carry role evidence, not raw phone/e-mail.
operator_context.source_next_action: Attach missing evidence, verify owner domain, then re-run graph metadata validation.
